news.summary: A company criticized the president's executive order as a clear infringement of the First Amendment rights. Legal firm WilmerHale is anticipated to submit its own legal challenge against the administration in response.
news.headline: Law firm targeted by Trump seeks permanent relief, deems EO a First Amendment violation. WilmerHale to file opposition.

news.summary: In Bowie, MD on April 8, 2025, Blink Charging Co. (NASDAQ: BLNK) revealed that it has been notified by Nasdaq on April 2, 2025, about its non-compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(1) due to the delay in filing its Form 10-K for the year ending on December 31, 2024, as required by Securities and Exchange Commission regulations. Blink Charging Co. is recognized globally as a prominent entity involved in the ownership, operation, provision, and production of electric vehicle (EV) charging solutions and services.
news.headline: Blink Charging Co. is notified by Nasdaq for late filing of Form 10-K for 2024; no longer complies with Nasdaq rules.

news.summary: Stock market saw a significant shift on Tuesday as it reversed its upward trend after substantial early gains, mainly due to the looming threat of imposing large tariffs by Trump. This turnaround led to Apple and Tesla experiencing notable drops in their stock prices. The Dow Jones Futures also fell in light of the impending Trump tariffs, marking a challenging day for investors in an uncertain market environment.
news.headline: Stock market reverses lower as Dow Jones futures fall due to Trump tariffs looming, leading to Apple and Tesla tumbling.

news.summary: Today, in Wilmington, Mass., UniFirst Corporation (NYSE: UNF) announced that the Board of Directors approved regular quarterly cash dividends for shareholders. The Company's Common Stock will receive $0.350 per share (35.0 cents), and the Class B Common Stock will receive $0.280 per share (28.0 cents). These dividends are set to be paid on June 27, 2025, to shareholders of record as of June 6, 2025.
news.headline: UniFirst's board declares $0.35/share dividends for Common Stock and $0.28/share for Class B, payable on June 27, 2025.

news.summary: Lotus Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: LOT), a prominent worldwide provider of intelligent and premium mobility services, revealed alterations to its executive team and board of directors on April 8, 2025.
news.headline: Lotus Tech Inc. (Nasdaq: LOT) announces management and board changes, focus on global intelligent luxury mobility.

news.summary: Today in Novi, Michigan, General Motors awarded Gentherm with the 2024 Supplier of the Year Award at GM's 33rd annual Supplier of the Year event held in Phoenix, Arizona.
news.headline: Gentherm honored as 2024 GM Supplier of the Year in Phoenix event.

news.summary: Encore Capital Group, Inc. (Nasdaq:ECPG) revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the initial quarter of 2025 on May 7, 2025, post-market closure. A conference call and presentation are scheduled for the same day at 2:00 p.m. Pacific / 5:00 p.m. Eastern time. During the event, Ashish Masih, President and CEO, Tomas Hernanz, EVP and CFO, and Bruce Thomas, VP of Global Investor Relations, will review and analyze the results.
news.headline: Encore Capital Group (Nasdaq:ECPG) to reveal Q1 2025 financials on May 7; conference call at 2:00 pm Pacific / 5:00 pm Eastern.

news.summary: Today, NowVertical Group Inc. (TSXV: NOW), a prominent data and AI solutions provider based in Toronto, was recognized as the 2025 Google Cloud Data & Analytics Partner of the Year for Latin America. This prestigious award highlights the company's exceptional expertise and innovation in the field.
news.headline: NowVertical Group Inc. wins 2025 Google Cloud Data & Analytics Partner of the Year for Latin America. TSXV: NOW.

news.summary: Serina Therapeutics, Inc., headquartered in Huntsville, Alabama, shared that they have successfully secured a $5 million financing from strategic shareholders. This funding will aid in advancing the development of SER-252 (POZ-apomorphine), the company's primary clinical candidate for Advanced Parkinson's disease. Moreover, Serina is gearing up to launch a Phase 1 clinical trial for SER-252 in the fourth quarter of 2025. Serina specializes in utilizing its proprietary POZ Platform™ drug optimization technology and is listed on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol SER.
news.headline: Serina Therapeutics gets $5M funding for clinical development of SER-252 in Parkinson's Disease Phase 1 trial.

news.summary: Ingersoll Rand Inc., a leading global company specializing in mission-critical flow creation, life science, and industrial solutions, is set to announce its first quarter 2025 financial results on May 1, 2025, after the market closes. The company, listed as IR on the New York Stock Exchange, is headquartered in Davidson, North Carolina. Investors and stakeholders are eagerly anticipating this upcoming report to assess the company's performance and financial standing in the current quarter.
news.headline: Ingersoll Rand (NYSE: IR) to release Q1 2025 earnings report on May 1, 2025, after markets close.
Update: Proposed resolutions for STMicroelectronics' 2025 AGM have been amended. Shareholders to take note.

news.summary: In Johns Creek, Georgia, on April 8, 2025, Saia, Inc. (Nasdaq: SAIA), a prominent transportation provider specializing in national less-than-truckload (LTL), non-asset truckload, expedited, and logistics services, disclosed plans to unveil its quarterly financial results on Friday, April 25th before the market launch. Following this, the management of Saia will conduct a conference call to elaborate on the outcomes at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time.
news.headline: Saia (Nasdaq: SAIA) to reveal Q1 2025 results on April 25; their management to discuss the figures in a conference call at 10:00 am ET.

news.summary: In St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador, Fortis Inc. (TSX/NYSE: FTS) is set to announce its first quarter financial results for 2025 on May 7, 2025. The teleconference and webcast discussing these results will take place at 8:30 a.m. (Eastern) on the same day. During this event, David Hutchens, President and CEO, and Jocelyn Perry, Executive VP and CFO, will provide insights into the Corporation's financial performance for the first quarter of the year.
news.headline: Fortis Inc. will announce Q1 2025 results on May 7, with a teleconference at 8:30 a.m. (Eastern). Annual meeting on May 8.

news.summary: Two new brand presidents have been appointed to steer the execution of the Path to Potential strategy, further leveraging the company's solid foundation. This move aims to kickstart a new era of innovation within the organization. These presidents will be responsible for overseeing key operations with a focus on growth and development. The strategy is set to propel the company forward, with a specific emphasis on innovation and progress. This decision reflects the company's commitment to staying at the forefront of the industry. The new brand presidents are gearing up to lead this charge, highlighting the importance of strategic leadership in achieving the organization's goals.
news.headline: Victoria’s Secret & Co. appoints new brand presidents to drive growth and innovation, shaping the company's future direction.

news.summary: BellRing Brands, Inc. (NYSE:BRBR) disclosed that it will conduct a conference call on Tuesday, May 6, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. EDT to address the financial outcomes of the second quarter of fiscal year 2025 and provide insights into the fiscal year 2025 projections. The call will include participation from Darcy H. Davenport, President and Chief Executive Officer, as well as Paul A. Rode, Chief Financial Officer. Furthermore, the company plans to unveil its second-quarter financial results after markets close on Monday, May 5, 2025.
news.headline: BellRing Brands to hold Q2 fiscal year 2025 call on May 6, 2025 at 9am EDT. Financial results to be released on May 5. CEO and CFO to participate.

news.summary: In Vancouver, BC, Eldorado Gold Corporation will disclose its First Quarter 2025 Financial and Operational Results post-market on May 1, 2025. They are set to conduct a conference call on May 2, 2025, at 11:30 AM ET (8:30 AM PT).
news.headline: Eldorado Gold to release Q1 2025 results on May 1, with conference call on May 2 at 11:30 AM ET.

news.summary: Exco Technologies Limited (TSX: XTC) disclosed today its plan to release the financial outcomes for the second quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The report is scheduled to be released after market hours on Wednesday, April 30, 2025.
news.headline: Exco Technologies Limited (TSX: XTC) will report Q2 financial results on April 30, 2025.

news.summary: In Toronto, Huntsman, the prestigious Savile Row tailor, and Menē Inc. (TSX-V:MENE) (US:MENEF) have proudly revealed an exclusive partnership. They are introducing the Huntsman x Menē 24K collection, consisting of dress studs, cufflinks, and buttons meticulously crafted from 24-karat gold and pure platinum. These pieces are exclusively available through custom order only. Authentic craftsmanship shines through in this unique collaboration between the renowned tailoring house and the innovative jewelry brand.
news.headline: Huntsman and Menē partner for exclusive 24K gold and pure platinum accessory collection. Items available on made-to-order basis.

news.summary: In San Antonio, Taco Cabana and Cholula® are teaming up to introduce a fiery new drink called the Cholula® Rita. The partnership combines the renowned Mexican-inspired cuisine of Taco Cabana with the world's leading Mexican Hot Sauce. This exclusive cocktail promises to add a kick to happy hour, blending the signature heat of Cholula with the traditional zest of a margarita. Together, they are offering an innovative beverage that will surely excite taste buds. Cholula® is known as the #1 Mexican Hot Sauce in the world, making this collaboration a highly anticipated event for fans of both brands.
news.headline: Taco Cabana and Cholula partner for exclusive Cholula® Rita cocktail to spice up happy hour ahead of Cinco de Mayo.

news.summary: Minneapolis-based company Nortech Systems has recently unveiled a groundbreaking patent for non-magnetic expanded beam fiber optic cables, positioning itself as a key player in the digital connectivity solutions and data management engineering sector. This innovative technology offers a lighter, faster, and more sustainable connectivity solution that is ruggedized for superior performance in demanding environments. The patent reflects Nortech's commitment to pushing the boundaries of connectivity, solidifying its position as a global leader.
news.headline: Nortech unveils patent for non-magnetic expanded beam fiber optic cables, revolutionizing connectivity for superior performance.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was stated that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, marking a significant improvement from the previous month's rate of 5.1%. The report also revealed that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the past month, surpassing expectations and indicating a positive trend in the job market. Additionally, the report highlighted an increase in average hourly wages by 3.2% compared to the same period last year. These numbers suggest a strengthening economy and a promising outlook for the labor market in the near future.
news.headline: Judge directs White House to reinstate Associated Press access after revoking credentials.

news.summary: A recent study revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.6% in October, the lowest it has been since 2008. This indicates a significant improvement in the job market, as 531,000 jobs were added last month. Among these, the majority were in the leisure and hospitality sectors, followed by professional and business services. The decrease in the unemployment rate and the substantial job growth are positive signs for the country's economy, showing progress towards recovery from the impact of the pandemic.
news.headline: Wall Street in turmoil as sudden sell-offs disrupt market stability.
Uruguay Central Bank Raises Key Rate to 9.25% from 9.0%

news.summary: The ongoing conflict between two key advisors of President Trump is unfolding amidst the repercussions of the administration's recent tariffs, resulting in significant losses across global financial markets.
news.headline: Musk criticizes Navarro, clashes with Trump adviser, causing turmoil amid global markets' significant losses due to new tariffs.
Haddad year on year 2026 budget bill will show government effort to reduce debt

news.summary: In Colorado Springs, Redwire Corporation (NYSE: RDW) and ispace technologies-U.S., inc. disclosed at the 40th Space Symposium an agreement to collaborate on commercial lunar exploration and science missions for NASA's Commercial Lunar Payload Services. Redwire, renowned for advanced space infrastructure, and ispace-U.S., a lunar exploration specialist, are aiming to work together in this venture. This partnership signifies a step towards advancing the next-gen space economy.
news.headline: Redwire and ispace-U.S. join forces for lunar exploration with NASA, aiming for commercial missions. #RDW #SpaceSymposium
Haddad: central bank working on bringing inflation to target

news.summary: LTC Properties Inc. (NYSE: LTC) based in Westlake Village, California, revealed that senior management is set to attend the Deutsche Bank Healthcare REIT Summit on April 10, 2025, in a virtual capacity. The real estate investment trust focuses on seniors housing and health care properties through sale-leasebacks and mortgage financing. A presentation package will be accessible online at https://ir.ltcreit.com/Investors for those interested. This event serves as a platform for industry insights and networking opportunities for LTC, a notable player in the sector.
news.headline: LTC will participate in the Deutsche Bank Healthcare REIT Summit on April 10, 2025 virtually.

news.summary: Cboe BZX Exchange has sought approval from US regulators to list an ETF backed by Sui (SUI) token, with a market cap of $6.5 billion. The ETF, if approved by the SEC, would be the first in the US to hold SUI and is issued by Canary Capital. Sui is a blockchain network with $1.1 billion in Total Value Locked (TVL) and designed for user-friendly onboarding. Canary has filed for various proposed crypto ETFs including SUI, Litecoin, XRP, and others since 2024. The SEC has acknowledged numerous altcoin ETF filings since January 20, including Solana, Dogecoin, and Trump coin. However, demand for altcoin ETFs may be weaker compared to mainstream cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ether, according to Sygnum Bank's research head.
news.headline: Cboe BZX seeks SEC approval to list Canary's SUI ETF, backed by $6.5B SUI token. Sui Network has $1.1B TVL and aims to streamline user experience.

news.summary: Cleveland-Cliffs Inc. (NYSE: CLF) is set to reveal its first-quarter 2025 earnings after the U.S. market closes on May 7, 2025. Stakeholders are encouraged to tune in to a live conference call with analysts and institutional investors discussing the results on May 8, 2025, at 8:30 am ET. The call will be accessible on www.clevelandcliffs.com and can be replayed from the same link afterward.
news.headline: Cleveland-Cliffs (NYSE: CLF) to announce Q1 2025 earnings on May 7 and host conference call on May 8 at 8:30 am ET.

news.summary: In Westchester, Illinois, RB Global, Inc. (NYSE: RBA) (TSX: RBA) has revealed plans to unveil its first-quarter 2025 financial outcomes post-market closure on Wednesday, May 7, 2025. A conference call to review these results is scheduled at 4:30 p.m. Eastern time on the same day. Interested analysts and institutional investors can sign up in advance to join the call through: https://registrations.events/direct/Q4I602500. An official invitation will be extended to registered participants.
news.headline: RB Global (NYSE: RBA) to report Q1 2025 results on May 7, 2025. Conference call at 4:30 pm Eastern time. Pre-register to participate.

news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, GE Vernova (NYSE: GEV) revealed that their Board of Directors sanctioned a quarterly dividend of $0.25 per share. The payment is slated for May 16, 2025, for shareholders recorded as of April 18, 2025. Subsequent dividend determinations will be subject to the Board's judgment, considering factors like earnings, financial well-being, cash needs, and future prospects of GE Vernova. For more details, visit GE Vernova's website.
news.headline: GE Vernova (NYSE: GEV) declares $0.25 per share dividend payable on May 16, 2025, to shareholders of record on April 18, 2025.

news.summary: Pembina Pipeline Corporation (TSX: PPL; NYSE: PBA) based in Calgary, Alberta, has announced the declaration of quarterly dividends for its preferred shares. The dividends for Series 1, 3, 5, 7, 9, and 21 are scheduled to be paid on June 2, 2025, to shareholders of record as of May 1, 2025. For Series 15, 17, and 19, the dividends will be payable on June 30, 2025. The announcement covers preferred shares Series 1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 15, 17, 19, 21, and 25.
news.headline: Pembina Pipeline Corp declares quarterly preferred share dividends, dates in June 2025, for Series 1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 15, 17, 19, 21, 25.

news.summary: President Donald Trump's ambitious plan to use tariffs as a means to fund future tax cuts is facing potential consequences, as experts warn of slower economic growth and increased consumer hardship. The Tax Foundation conducted a study on Trump's tariff strategy unveiled on April 2, predicting it could result in the largest tax hike since 1982 and a 0.7% decrease in GDP over the next decade, without factoring in possible retaliation from other countries. The proposed tariffs aim to raise the average rate on all imports from 2.5% to 16.5% by 2025, a level not seen since 1937 during the Great Depression. This plan, in conjunction with previous tariff escalations, is anticipated to generate $2.9 trillion in revenue.
news.headline: Trump's tariff strategy could lead to biggest tax hike since 1982, with tariffs increasing from 2.5% to 16.5% by 2025, shrinking GDP by 0.7%.

news.summary: President Donald Trump announced a significant shift in energy policy on Tuesday by unveiling plans to revitalize U.S. coal production to meet increasing energy demands, contrasting with the Biden and Obama administrations' environmental focus. This move comes as Wall Street faced deeper declines due to escalating tariff issues with China, stirring concerns about a global economic slowdown. Trump stated, "We're ending Joe Biden's war on beautiful clean coal once and for all," expressing intentions to reopen coal plants, reemploy miners, and expedite mining permits while reducing environmental regulations. He emphasized coal as a reliable and potent energy source. In 2023, U.S. coal production amounted to 578 million short tons, a decrease from the 1.17 billion short tons produced previously.
news.headline: Trump announces plan to boost coal production and ease regulations, while S&P 500 hits 1-year low due to tariff tensions with China.
China stands to gain from the departure of Silicon Valley companies, per latest report.

news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas, a prominent provider of advanced Flight Data Monitoring (FDM) and Flight Operations Quality Assurance (FOQA) flight safety analytics and technology, previously known as Truth Data Insights, has officially rebranded as Brazos Safety Systems. This change represents a significant step in the company's development, reflecting its updated mission, expanded portfolio, and increasing clientele. The transformation signifies a momentous occasion in the organization's progression as it adapts to better cater to its growing customer community.
news.headline: Truth Data Insights rebrands to Brazos Safety Systems, offering FDM & FOQA analytics. Exciting move reflects its growth & evolution.
Trump signs an action directing DoJ to fight local coal regulation.
Trump ends remarks at the White House.

news.summary: Real estate company Kilroy Realty Corporation (NYSE: KRC) revealed plans to unveil its first quarter 2025 financial results after market hours on Monday, May 5, 2025. A conference call to delve into the results is scheduled for Tuesday, May 6, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. PT / 1:00 p.m. ET. Interested individuals can register for the call and access dial-in information via the provided link: https://www.netroadshow.com/events/login?show=d84ce754&confId=80006.
news.headline: Kilroy Realty (KRC) to release Q1 2025 results on May 5, 2025, with a conference call on May 6, 2025 at 10AM PT / 1PM ET. Register to participate.

news.summary: The California Lawyers Association (CLA) released a statement today affirming its commitment to upholding the rule of law. Formed in 2018, CLA is a nonprofit bar association representing numerous licensed attorneys across California. As the leading statewide advocate for the legal field, CLA works to support its members on key industry matters. The association's core mission is centered on "promoting excellence, diversity, and inclusion" within the legal community.
news.headline: California Lawyers Association defends rule of law, established in 2018, serves thousands of licensed attorneys.
Trump signs action on coal permitting.

news.summary: Govly, a company based in San Francisco, made an announcement on April 8, 2025, about their AI-Assisted Contract and Procurement Management System. This system is now accessible through the SBIR Aisle program, which is overseen by the Chief Digital and Artificial Intelligence Officer. Govly specializes in market intelligence and capture services for public sector procurement.
news.headline: Govly's AI contract and procurement system now on DoD's Tradewinds Marketplace through SBIR Aisle program.

news.summary: The United States has imposed a steep tariff rate of 104% on imports from China. This move is likely to have significant repercussions on trade relations between the two countries. The tariff was announced on April 8, 2025. This development will likely impact various industries and could potentially lead to a trade war between the US and China.
news.headline: US imposes 104% tariff on China | Effective immediately | Potential impact on trade relations | 04/08/2025

news.summary: A reputable mergers and acquisitions advisory firm, Generational Group, recently facilitated the sale of Ray Norton Tire and Auto Center to a Private Investor. The transaction was finalized on March 26, 2025. Established in 1987, Ray Norton Tire and Auto Center, situated in Valdosta, Georgia, has built a strong reputation for providing reliable automotive services. This family-owned business, known for its commitment to Christian values, specializes in tire sales, brake repairs, oil changes, and various automotive services.
news.headline: Ray Norton Tire and Auto Center in Valdosta, GA sold to Private Investor by Generational Group. Established in 1987, it offers tire sales, brake repairs, oil changes. Acquisition closed on March 26, 2025.

news.summary: Paychex, Inc. (Nasdaq: PAYX) has disclosed the pricing of a public offering for senior notes worth $4.2 billion. This offering comprises $1.5 billion of 5.100% notes due 2030, $1.5 billion of 5.350% notes due 2032, and $1.2 billion of 5.600% notes due 2035. The closing of this offering is anticipated around April 10, 2025, pending standard closing conditions.
news.headline: Paychex, Inc. prices $4.2 billion senior notes offering with 5.100%, 5.350%, and 5.600% due in 2030, 2032, and 2035.

news.summary: Jamieson Greer, a key trade representative for the United States, along with other officials from the Trump administration, have emphasized the readiness of the U.S. to engage in negotiations. However, despite this willingness to discuss, they have indicated that significant tariffs are still scheduled to be implemented.
news.headline: US to keep 104% tariffs on China; open to negotiation, says trade rep. Tariffs to stay despite talks.

news.summary: BXP, Inc. (NYSE: BXP), the leading developer, owner, and manager of top-tier workplaces in the US, will unveil its financial results for Q1 2025 on April 29, 2025, post NYSE trading hours. Following this, a conference call and webcast are scheduled for April 30, 2025, at 10:00 AM ET to address the financial outcomes and offer insights into BXP's progress. Shareholders and other interested parties are welcome to participate in the call.
news.headline: BXP, largest US workspace developer (NYSE: BXP), to announce Q1 2025 financial results on April 29, 2025. Conference call on April 30 at 10 AM ET.

news.summary: Aehr Test Systems (NASDAQ: AEHR) announced its Q3 earnings, surpassing expectations. The company reported earnings of 7 cents per share, exceeding the estimated 4 cents. Quarterly revenue stood at $18.31 million, beating the expected $17.76 million and marking a significant rise from last year's $7.56 million revenue for the same period. The full report can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Aehr Test Systems stock rises after Q3 results with earnings of 7 cents/share and revenue of $18.31 million, beating estimates.

news.summary: In Amsterdam on April 8, 2025, OCI Global, a prominent hydrogen products producer and distributor, revealed a Support Agreement with a Bondholder Group holding its U.S. $600,000,000 debt. The agreement signifies a significant development for the company, traded on Euronext under the symbol OCI.
news.headline: OCI Global (Euronext: OCI) reached support agreement with U.S.$600,000,000 bondholders.
